sentence: 他年资较深，所以工资比较高。
pinyin: Tā nián zī jiào shēn, suǒyǐ gōngzī bǐjiào gāo.
english: He has more seniority, so his salary is relatively high.

sentence: 学校正在为图书馆募款。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zhèngzài wèi túshūguǎn mù kuǎn.
english: The school is raising money for the library.

sentence: 这里发现了一处汉代墓葬。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ fāxiàn le yī chù Hàn dài mù zàng.
english: A Han dynasty tomb was discovered here.

sentence: 这次事故已上报给航空局调查。
pinyin: Zhè cì shìgù yǐ shàngbào gěi háng kōng jú diàochá.
english: This incident has been reported to the aviation agency for investigation.

sentence: 这个方案的实效还有待观察。
pinyin: Zhège fāng'àn de shí xiào hái yǒudài guānchá.
english: The practical effectiveness of this plan remains to be seen.
